mapper.select: SELECT appointment_id, appointment_no, elder_id, elder_name, elder_phone, elder_address, district_code, service_type_code, service_type_name, appointment_date, appointment_time, service_hours, status, status_name, dispatch_time, receive_time, staff_id, staff_name, staff_phone, provider_id, provider_name, remark, cancel_reason, registration_fee, service_fee, subsidy_amount, self_pay_amount, order_id, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND validity = 'VALID'
